name: Spicy Berry Cider
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Apple cider (or slightly sweetened apple juice)
2 cups Raspberries (fresh) or 4 packets Equal (or 2 cups frozen raspberries and 1 1/4 teaspoons Equal measure)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine the apple cider, pineapple juice, allspice, cloves, and nutmeg. Bring slowly to a boil.
2. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes.
3. Remove from heat and strain through a fine mesh sieve or cheesecloth to remove seeds.
4. Stir in the Equal packets or measure (4 teaspoons) until dissolved.
5. Serve hot in mugs and garnish with a cinnamon stick if desired.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
